highlights.text: Serial code PY-005 | TRAGUIN tour code TG-PY-LEI-005
State / Country: Puducherry, India | Category: Senior Citizen Leisure Tour
Destinations: Puducherry (French Quarter) • Auroville • Paradise Beach
Ideal for: Senior Citizens, Couples, Families, Slow Travelers
Vehicle: Premium Air-Conditioned Toyota Innova (Senior-Friendly, Smooth Ride)
Meal Plan: Breakfast & Curated Mild Dinners (Customized Comfort Dining)
Route Map: Chennai International Airport Arrival → Puducherry Coastal Drive → White Town Exploration → Auroville → Chennai Departure
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Specialized slow-paced routing custom-tailored around senior travelers' maximum comfort and zero physical fatigue.
Curated by Experts: Handpicked restaurants serving exceptionally fresh, high-quality, non-spicy, healthy meal options.

Shopping & Local Experiences: Local Markets & Boutiques: Famous for purchasing organic essential oils, handcrafted clay pottery, and fine linen clothing. Instagram Spots: The sweeping palm-lined view at Promenade Beach and the quaint pastel streets of White Town.

Important Notes: Advance Booking Suggestion: Highly recommended to secure bookings 45–60 days in advance during winter peak months. Weather Note: Light cotton clothes are ideal year-round, along with comfortable flat walking shoes. Wheelchair assistance can be pre-arranged at all heritage sites upon giving 24-hour notice to our team.

itinerary.title: Premium Puducherry Leisure Tour Package
itinerary.tagline: Premium Puducherry Leisure Tour Package • 04 Nights / 05 Days
itinerary.overview:
Welcome to the French Riviera of the East. Our thoughtfully designed Leisure Puducherry Family Tour by TRAGUIN is expertly crafted for senior citizens, featuring effortless transitions, leisurely pacing, and premium stays. Walk along tree-lined boulevards, behold colonial French architecture, and collect unforgettable memories at an incredibly relaxed pace. Enjoy our handpicked hotels that offer top-tier comfort, easy accessibility, and warm hospitality.

TOUR OVERVIEW
Vehicle Type: Premium Air-Conditioned Toyota Innova (Senior-Friendly, Smooth Ride)
Meal Plan: Breakfast & Curated Mild Dinners (Customized Comfort Dining)
Route Plan: Chennai International Airport Arrival → Puducherry Coastal Drive → White Town Exploration → Auroville → Chennai Departure

Curated Note:
This premium holiday package features complete ground support, ground-floor/elevator-accessible rooms, minimal walking barriers, and private vehicle setups for complete peace of mind.

Puducherry is a beautiful coastal enclave, highly searched as a choice for a Best Puducherry Tour Package or a relaxing Puducherry Family Tour. Combining seaside serenity with a quaint Indo-French lifestyle, it offers wonderful spots for an offbeat Luxury Puducherry Holiday.
White Town (French Quarter): Known for pastel-yellow colonial villas, boutique cafes, and cobblestone pathways—the ultimate popular Instagram locations for portrait memories.
Auroville Matrimandir: A stunning golden metallic sphere representing unity and peace, offering immersive experiences in tranquility and meditation.
Promenade Beach: A magnificent beachfront boulevard completely closed to vehicular traffic in the evening, ensuring senior citizens can enjoy a peaceful sunset stroll.
Best Time to Visit Puducherry: The cool, pleasant winter months from October to March present an optimal climate for comfortable Puducherry Sightseeing.
itinerary.seo_title: PY-005 | Premium Puducherry Leisure Tour Package | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Puducherry leisure package (PY-005 / TG-PY-LEI-005): French Quarter, Auroville, Paradise Beach, and 4-tier senior-friendly accommodation.

highlights.text: Scenic East Coast Road drive and leisurely White Town colonial sightseeing
Auroville International Township, Matrimandir Viewpoint, and eco-shuttle golf cart access
Chunnambar Backwater Ferry and Paradise Beach sandbanks with covered luxury ferry
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Slow-paced routing for senior travelers' maximum comfort
Premium senior-friendly accommodation with elevator-equipped heritage properties

days.title: Arrival in Chennai – Scenic East Coast Road Drive to Puducherry
days.description: Arrive at Chennai International Airport, where a dedicated TRAGUIN representative welcomes you and handles your baggage. Board your premium private vehicle for a smooth, scenic drive along the East Coast Road (ECR). Enjoy mesmerizing glimpses of the Bay of Bengal on one side and lush salt pans on the other. Upon arrival in Puducherry, check into your handpicked luxury hotel in the heart of White Town and relax for the evening.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Scenic Coastal Road Drive, Leisure Hotel Check-in
Welcome Amenities: Complimentary cooling herbal tea, traditional stoles, and fresh local flowers upon arrival.
Overnight Stay: Puducherry (Premium Luxury Heritage Boutique Hotel)

days.title: White Town Walking Trail & Colonial Indo-French Sightseeing
days.description: Savor a relaxed morning breakfast. Today, your Puducherry Sightseeing journey begins with a beautifully organized, slow-paced exploration of the French Quarter. Travel comfortably via an open-air luxury rickshaw cart or a slow vehicle to admire the iconic attractions, including the Notre Dame des Anges Church and the French War Memorial. In the evening, relax at the paved Promenade Beach boulevard right by the sea.
activities: Sightseeing Included: White Town Heritage Buildings, Sri Aurobindo Ashram, Promenade Beach Boulevard
Photography Points: Vibrant bougainvillea-draped yellow walls of French heritage mansions.

days.title: Auroville Community & Spiritual Matrimandir Excursion
days.description: Following a refreshing premium breakfast, take a comfortable short drive to Auroville, the international township of peace. Ride a battery-operated eco-shuttle through shaded forest pathways directly to the Matrimandir Viewing Point. Behold the magnificent golden sphere reflecting breathtaking landscapes under the morning sun. Spend a relaxed afternoon exploring sustainable handicraft boutiques and organic cafes.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Auroville International Township, Matrimandir Viewpoint, Auroville Visitor Center
Food Suggestion: Freshly baked local pastries and authentic French-pressed premium coffee.

days.title: Chunnambar Lagoon Cruise & Paradise Beach Escape
days.description: Indulge in a delicious breakfast. Today, take a brief drive to Chunnambar boat house. Board a safely managed, private covered luxury ferry boat for a gentle cruise down the backwaters to the pristine sandbanks of Paradise Beach. Spend your afternoon relaxing under cozy thatched shacks, listening to the soft waves. Return to your premium stay in the afternoon with plenty of open time for personal relaxation.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Chunnambar Backwater Ferry, Paradise Beach Sandbanks
Evening Experience: A special curated, peaceful dinner inside a converted French colonial villa courtyard.

days.title: Local Market Souvenirs & Drive Back to Chennai Departure
days.description: Enjoy your final breakfast at the hotel. Spend an hour shopping for premium handmade items, aromatic incense sticks, and fine linens. Your private chauffeur will then drive you comfortably back via ECR to Chennai International Airport. Your memorable Premium Puducherry Experience concludes here, leaving you with beautifully curated experiences and unforgettable memories arranged by TRAGUIN.
activities: Assistance: Complete airport gate porter service and baggage check-in support.

Daily premium breakfasts and multi-course comforting dinners.
Private luxury AC Toyota Innova for all transfers & touring tracks.
Complimentary eco-shuttle golf cart tickets inside Auroville.
Private covered ferry boat cruise to Paradise Beach.
Dedicated 24/7 localized phone and ground TRAGUIN Support.
All applicable luxury state taxes, driver tolls, and parking fees.
Airfare or national train tickets to/from Chennai.
Camera entry charges or optional local guide fee tips.
Personal laundry expenditures, telephone billing, or alcohol.
Any travel or medical insurance coverage plans.
